message:
fix: Gate daemon module behind #[cfg(unix)] for Windows compatibility

The daemon module uses Unix domain sockets which are not available
on Windows. This prevents compilation on Windows platforms.

Gate the daemon module behind #[cfg(unix)] so the rest of the
codebase compiles on Windows. Daemon functionality will simply
be unavailable on Windows.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
